name: Simple Spin
preceding_figure_names: Change of Places Left to Right
following_figure_names: Link, Change of Places Left to Right, Hip Bump, Change of Hands Behind Back, American Spin (spin from L to R hand hold), Stop and Go
notes: Variation - dance an overturned Fallaway Throwaway or overturned Change of Places L to R, ending in Tandem Position.

steps.action: Replace weight to RF in Open Position
Turn to R on LF, then RF fwd, small step
comments: Turn is started at end of previous beat.

steps.action: Turn to R on RF, then LF back and slightly side in Open Position
